name: stockyard-chatmem
description: Conversation memory middleware. Sliding window, summarization, and importance-based strategies. Persist memory across sessions without eating context windows.

tools.name: chatmem_sessions
tools.description: List active conversation sessions with message counts and last activity.

tools.name: chatmem_get
tools.description: Get memory state for a specific session.

tools.name: chatmem_clear
tools.description: Clear memory for a specific session.

tools.name: chatmem_stats
tools.description: Get memory statistics: active sessions, total messages stored, token savings.

tools.name: chatmem_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the ChatMem proxy is running and healthy.
